title: BEM-880 WRK-C2
objective:
Run script:

Path('governance/rules').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/channels').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/logs').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
rule_registry = {
  'status':'active',
  'canonical_term':'реестр правил',
  'purpose':'versioned source of operational rules, conditions, incident sources, approved actions, prohibited actions, owners and conflict policy',
  'rules':[
    {'id':'RULE-001','owner':'OBJ-GD-001','scope':'directors','condition':'director-level policy or cross-direction conflict','approved_action':'escalate to general director curator','prohibited_action':'low-level element changes director rules directly','version':'1.0'},
    {'id':'RULE-002','owner':'OBJ-DIR-001','scope':'workers','condition':'worker execution or repeated worker incident','approved_action':'director rules-management contour updates worker rule after analysis','prohibited_action':'duplicate conflicting rule without review','version':'1.0'},
    {'id':'RULE-003','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'worker internal contours','condition':'task execution, result handoff, blocker, or testing assignment','approved_action':'curator assigns contour and records event','prohibited_action':'contour writes to main workspace without PASS','version':'1.0'}
  ],
  'conflict_policy':'new rule must reference source incident; duplicate conditions are merged or versioned, not copied blindly'
}
Path('governance/state/rule_registry.json').write_text(json.dumps(rule_registry, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/rules/BEM880_RULE_REGISTRY.md').write_text('# BEM-880 Реестр правил\n\nStatus: active\n\nРеестр правил является единым источником правил для объектов, элементов, внутренних контуров и продуктовых репозиториев.\n\nКаждое правило имеет владельца, условия применения, разрешённое действие, запрещённое действие, версию и источник опыта.\n', encoding='utf-8')
channel = {
  'status':'active',
  'common_managed_channel':'global governance mechanism that includes rule registry and allowed message routes',
  'external_exchange_rule':'object-to-object exchange goes curator-to-curator only',
  'internal_channels':'inside each object, internal contours communicate through curator-governed internal channel',
  'message_types':['task','result','blocker','risk_warning','rule_update','testing_assignment'],
  'required_ids':['task_id','trace_id','owner','source_object','target_object']
}
Path('governance/state/channel_registry.json').write_text(json.dumps(channel, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/channels/BEM880_MANAGED_COMMON_CHANNEL.md').write_text('# BEM-880 Управляемый общий канал\n\nStatus: active\n\nОбщий канал связывает объекты системы через их кураторов и опирается на реестр правил.\n\nВнутренние каналы работают внутри объекта и не заменяют внешний обмен куратор-куратор.\n', encoding='utf-8')
events = [
  {'event':'operator_approved_v17','actor':'operator','target':'BEM-879 v1.7','status':'recorded'},
  {'event':'worker_started','actor':'external_auditor','target':'OBJ-WRK-001','status':'recorded'},
  {'event':'wrk_c1_completed','actor':'WRK-C1','target':'architecture and registries','status':'completed'},
  {'event':'wrk_c2_completed','actor':'WRK-C2','target':'rules channel event log','status':'completed'}
]
Path('governance/logs/event_log.jsonl').write_text('\n'.join(json.dumps(e, ensure_ascii=False) for e in events) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
tr = Path('governance/state/task_registry.json')
if tr.exists():
    data = json.loads(tr.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for task in data.get('tasks', []):
        if task.get('owner') == 'WRK-C2':
            task['status'] = 'completed'
    tr.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/rule_registry.json','governance/rules/BEM880_RULE_REGISTRY.md','governance/state/channel_registry.json','governance/channels/BEM880_MANAGED_COMMON_CHANNEL.md','governance/logs/event_log.jsonl','governance/state/task_registry.json'])
ops_applied.append('WRK-C2 implemented rule registry, managed channel, event log')
